basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 08 July 2026 on the official website iitr.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the notification. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates on equal qualifications and experience.

qualification.education_qualification: 3 years Diploma/Graduation in any discipline after 12th level in science
qualification.details: 3 years Diploma/Graduation in any discipline after 12th level in science. Candidate having good writing skills and sound knowledge in English language with experience will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: 3 years Diploma/Graduation in any discipline after 12th level in science. Candidate having good writing skills and sound knowledge in English language with experience will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: No minimum or maximum age limit is specified in the notification. Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates on equal qualifications and experience.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary
IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post at IIT Roorkee is scheduled for 17th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The required qualification is a 3-year Diploma or Graduation in any discipline after completing the 12th level in science. Good writing skills and English language knowledge are preferred.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the IIT Roorkee office in Roorkee, Uttarakhand.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: While no specific age limit is mentioned, preference will be given to SC/ST candidates if they possess equal qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The position of Project Assistant is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post at IIT Roorkee.
